    Turn Scattered Data
    Into Smart Decisions

    One simple dashboard to track your SaaS growth, MRR, churn and user behavior—without the chaos of multiple tools.

    Trusted by leading companies worldwide

    Features

    Make Your Platform
    Work Harder For You

    Streamline your business with unified metrics and AI-powered analytics—all in one place.

    Unified Metrics

    See your MRR and active users in one clean, unified view — no more switching tabs.

    AI Growth Insights

    Actionable suggestions from your data, without digging into spreadsheets or dashboards.

    Product Usage Tracking

    Track how users engage with your app live to uncover patterns and optimize features.

    Feature Impact Analysis

    Know exactly which features drive long-term retention—and which ones don't contribute.

    Benefits

    Benefits That Truly
    Matter To You

    Monitor metrics as they happen, so you can respond quickly and keep your goals on track.

    Real-Time Tracking

    Monitor user activity instantly for smarter decision-making.

    All-in-One View

    Keep all your analytics in one place, without jumping between tools.

    Actionable Insights

    Track the metrics that matter most for sustainable business growth.

    Secure Data

    Keep your analytics safe with advanced security and strong encryption.

    Custom Reports

    Create tailored reports that fit your needs and highlight key insights.

    Simple to Use

    Navigate easily—no steep learning curve, start making better decisions quickly.

    How It Works

    Get Clear Answers
    In 3 Simple Steps

    From data to clarity—uncover insights, take action, and grow smarter in three simple steps.

    Connect Your Product

    Integrate in minutes with your existing stack—no engineering lift required.

    Track User Behavior

    See what's used, what's dropped, and what keeps users engaged.

    Turn Insights Into Action

    Get clear, actionable recommendations to boost retention and grow MRR.

    Integrations

    Seamless Integrations

    Connect Alytics with your favorite tools to streamline workflows and keep everything running smoothly.

    Testimonials

    Hear What Others
    Say About Us

    See what top teams say after switching to a smarter product analytics platform.

    We used Alytics to track onboarding drop-off and spotted a friction point instantly. After one small UX tweak, our activation rate jumped by 23%.

    Carter June

    I've tried nearly every analytics tool out there, and Alytics is by far the most intuitive. No need for devs to set things up—our marketing team was running insights independently in hours.

    Elena Park

    It's like product analytics finally caught up with design. We use Alytics not just for numbers—but to tell the story behind them. It's become our go-to tool for every launch.

    James Nair

    Alytics gave us visibility we didn't even know we were missing. Within the first week, we discovered which features were actually driving retention. It's clean and fast.

    Marcus Lee

    Since switching to Alytics, we finally understand how users interact with our product. The event tracking is super intuitive and actionable.

    Sarah Bond

    We used Alytics to track onboarding drop-off and spotted a friction point instantly. After one small UX tweak, our activation rate jumped by 23%.

    Carter June

    I've tried nearly every analytics tool out there, and Alytics is by far the most intuitive. No need for devs to set things up—our marketing team was running insights independently in hours.

    Elena Park

    It's like product analytics finally caught up with design. We use Alytics not just for numbers—but to tell the story behind them. It's become our go-to tool for every launch.

    James Nair

    Alytics gave us visibility we didn't even know we were missing. Within the first week, we discovered which features were actually driving retention. It's clean and fast.

    Marcus Lee

    Since switching to Alytics, we finally understand how users interact with our product. The event tracking is super intuitive and actionable.

    Sarah Bond

    Pricing

    Choose The Best
    Plan That Suits You

    Flexible pricing built for every stage — from startup to scale, no hidden fees.

    Save 20%

    Starter

    $39/month

    Great for small teams getting started.

    What's included

    • 5,000 tracked users
    • Core analytics
    • Simple dashboards
    • Email support
    • Weekly reports
    Get Started
    Most Popular

    Growth

    $99/month

    For fast-growing teams who are scaling.

    What's included

    • Everything in starter
    • 50,000 tracked users
    • Funnel & drop-off analysis
    • Custom dashboards
    • Team collaboration tools
    Get Started

    Premium

    $299/month

    Great for enterprises to convert more.

    What's included

    • All Growth features
    • Unlimited tracked users
    • Dedicated account manager
    • SLA & compliance support
    • Advanced integrations
    Get Started

    Why Alytics

    A Smarter Way To
    Grow With Data

    Turn complex metrics into clear insights that help you make better decisions, faster.

    Other Tools

    • Data lives in too many places
    • Reporting eats up hours
    • Insights are too generic
    • No smart guidance for decisions
    • Hard to see what's really working

    Alytics

    • All your metrics, one platform
    • Reports generate instantly
    • Insights tailored to your goals
    • AI suggests your next move
    • Clear path to consistent growth
